title: Appeals court questions shifting reasons for Trump’s EPA killing clean energy contracts
description: A federal appeals court questioned the Trump administration and nonprofits over the termination of a $20 billion green bank program.
content: A federal appeals court questioned the Trump administration and nonprofits over the termination of a $20 billion green bank program.
